name: Lemon Foam Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half of the chocolate in a double boiler (bain marie) and spread it evenly on the biscuit layer.
2. Beat egg whites and sugar together until stiff peaks form. Gently fold in lemon juice, zest, and dissolved gelatin into the foam mixture.
3. Shape the foam into a hemispherical form and place it onto the biscuit layer.
4. Refrigerate for 2 hours to allow the torte to set.
5. Melt the remaining chocolate and use it with candied lemon slices to decorate the cooled torte.
